# Almach

> A modern, accessible React UI component library monorepo.
> Built on Radix UI, Tailwind CSS v4, TanStack Query, TanStack Form, and Zod.
> Maintained by [@rafaalrazzak](https://github.com/rafaalrazzak).

- Docs: https://almach.pages.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/almach-lab/base
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/org/almach

## Packages

| Package | Version | Description |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| `@almach/ui` | 0.1.0 | 31+ accessible components (Radix UI + Tailwind CSS v4) |
| `@almach/forms` | 0.1.0 | Type-safe form builder (TanStack Form + Zod) |
| `@almach/query` | 0.1.0 | Query/mutation factories (TanStack Query v5) |
| `@almach/utils` | 0.1.0 | Tree-shakable utilities and TypeScript type helpers |

---

## Installation

```bash
# Install individual packages
bun add @almach/ui
bun add @almach/forms
bun add @almach/query
bun add @almach/utils

# Or install everything
bun add @almach/ui @almach/forms @almach/query @almach/utils
```

### Requirements

- React 18+
- Tailwind CSS v4
- Bun (recommended) or npm/pnpm/yarn

---

## Setup

### 1. Import global styles

In your app entry point or layout file, import the stylesheet from `@almach/ui`:

```ts
import "@almach/ui/styles";
```

This imports CSS variables and the Tailwind v4 theme. You must do this before using any components.

### 2. Wrap your app with providers

```tsx
import { BasedQueryProvider } from "@almach/query";
import { Toaster } from "@almach/ui";

export function App({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <BasedQueryProvider>
      {children}
      <Toaster />
    </BasedQueryProvider>
  );
}
```

`BasedQueryProvider` sets up TanStack Query with sensible defaults (stale time: 1 min, GC time: 5 min, retry 3x except on 4xx). `Toaster` is required for `toast()` notifications.

### 3. Tailwind CSS v4 config

No `tailwind.config.js` needed. Just point Tailwind at the source:

```css
/* app.css */
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "@almach/ui/styles";
```

---

## Theming

All design tokens are CSS variables — override them in your stylesheet:

```css
:root {
  /* Brand color (HSL values without hsl()) */
  --primary:             43 90% 44%;
  --primary-foreground:  0 0% 100%;

  /* Surfaces */
  --background:          0 0% 100%;
  --foreground:          240 10% 3.9%;
  --card:                0 0% 100%;
  --card-foreground:     240 10% 3.9%;
  --popover:             0 0% 100%;
  --popover-foreground:  240 10% 3.9%;

  /* Neutral */
  --secondary:           240 4.8% 95.9%;
  --secondary-foreground: 240 5.9% 10%;
  --muted:               240 4.8% 95.9%;
  --muted-foreground:    240 3.8% 46.1%;
  --accent:              240 4.8% 95.9%;
  --accent-foreground:   240 5.9% 10%;

  /* Semantic */
  --destructive:         0 84.2% 60.2%;
  --destructive-foreground: 0 0% 98%;
  --success:             142 76% 36%;
  --success-foreground:  0 0% 100%;
  --warning:             38 92% 50%;
  --warning-foreground:  0 0% 100%;

  /* Controls */
  --border:              240 5.9% 90%;
  --input:               240 5.9% 90%;
  --ring:                43 90% 44%;

  /* Border radius */
  --radius:              0.625rem;
}

.dark {
  --background: 240 10% 3.9%;
  /* ... override dark tokens */
}
```

---

## @almach/ui

### Button

```tsx
import { Button } from "@almach/ui";

<Button>Click me</Button>
<Button variant="outline" size="sm">Small</Button>
<Button loading>Saving...</Button>
<Button leftIcon={<SaveIcon />}>Save</Button>
<Button rightIcon={<ArrowRightIcon />}>Next</Button>
<Button asChild><a href="/dashboard">Go</a></Button>
```

**Props:**

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `variant` | `"default" \| "destructive" \| "outline" \| "secondary" \| "ghost" \| "link" \| "success" \| "warning"` | `"default"` | Visual style |
| `size` | `"sm" \| "default" \| "lg" \| "icon" \| "icon-sm" \| "icon-lg"` | `"default"` | Size |
| `loading` | `boolean` | `false` | Shows spinner, disables button |
| `leftIcon` | `React.ReactNode` | — | Icon before children |
| `rightIcon` | `React.ReactNode` | — | Icon after children |
| `asChild` | `boolean` | `false` | Render as child element (Radix Slot) |

---

### Input

```tsx
import { Input } from "@almach/ui";

<Input placeholder="Email" type="email" />
<Input leftElement={<SearchIcon />} placeholder="Search" />
<Input rightElement={<EyeIcon />} type="password" />
<Input error placeholder="Invalid field" />

// Date sub-component
<Input.Date value={date} onChange={setDate} />
<Input.Date withCalendar format="DD/MM/YYYY" value={date} onChange={setDate} />

// Currency sub-component
<Input.Currency />
<Input.Currency value={{ amount: 1234.56, currency: "EUR" }} onChange={setVal} />

// Custom flag renderer (CDN images, SVG libraries, etc.)
<Input.Currency
  renderFlag={(code) => (
    <img src={`https://flagcdn.com/w20/${code.toLowerCase()}.png`}
         width={20} height={15} alt={code} className="rounded-sm object-cover" />
  )}
/>
```

**Input Props:**

| Prop | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `leftElement` | `React.ReactNode` | Icon/element on the left (non-interactive) |
| `rightElement` | `React.ReactNode` | Icon/element on the right |
| `error` | `boolean` | Applies destructive ring |

**Input.Date Props:**

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `value` | `Date \| undefined` | — | Controlled date value |
| `onChange` | `(date: Date \| undefined) => void` | — | Change handler |
| `format` | `string` | `"MM/DD/YYYY"` | Segment order. Tokens: `MM`, `DD`, `YYYY`. Separator = first non-token char. Examples: `"DD/MM/YYYY"`, `"YYYY-MM-DD"` |
| `withCalendar` | `boolean` | `false` | Show calendar popover button |
| `error` | `boolean` | `false` | Applies destructive ring |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Disables all segments |

**Input.Currency Props:**

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `value` | `{ amount: number \| null; currency: string }` | — | Controlled value |
| `onChange` | `(value: { amount: number \| null; currency: string }) => void` | — | Change handler |
| `currencies` | `CurrencyDef[]` | built-in 36 | Override the currency list. Set `popular: true` to show in Popular group |
| `renderFlag` | `(countryCode: string, currency: CurrencyDef) => ReactNode` | `<CurrencyFlagBadge />` | Custom flag renderer. See examples below. |
| `placeholder` | `string` | `"0.00"` | Amount field placeholder |
| `currencySelector` | `"editable" \| "readonly" \| "hidden"` | `"editable"` | `"editable"` = dropdown; `"readonly"` = static badge; `"hidden"` = selector removed |
| `error` | `boolean` | `false` | Applies destructive ring; sets `aria-invalid` |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Disables amount input and currency selector |

`CurrencyDef`: `{ code: string; symbol: string; name: string; countryCode?: string; popular?: boolean }`

`countryCode` is ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (e.g. "US", "EU", "ID"). Used by `renderFlag`.

Built-in popular currencies: USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CHF, AUD, CAD, CNY. 28 additional currencies (INR, BRL, MXN, KRW, SGD, HKD, NOK, SEK, DKK, NZD, ZAR, TRY, AED, SAR, PLN, CZK, HUF, THB, IDR, MYR, PHP, VND, ILS, EGP, NGN, UAH, CLP, COP, PEN).

```tsx
import { CURRENCIES, CurrencyFlagBadge } from "@almach/ui";

// Restrict currency list
const limited = CURRENCIES.filter((c) => ["USD", "EUR", "GBP"].includes(c.code));
<Input.Currency currencies={limited} />

// CDN image flags (flagcdn.com)
<Input.Currency
  renderFlag={(code) => (
    <img src={`https://flagcdn.com/w20/${code.toLowerCase()}.png`}
         width={20} height={15} alt={code} className="rounded-sm object-cover" />
  )}
/>

// country-flag-icons SVG library (npm i country-flag-icons)
import Flags from "country-flag-icons/react/3x2";
<Input.Currency
  renderFlag={(code) => {
    const Flag = Flags[code as keyof typeof Flags];
    return Flag ? <Flag className="h-3.5 w-5 rounded-sm" /> : <CurrencyFlagBadge countryCode={code} />;
  }}
/>
```

---

### Badge

```tsx
import { Badge } from "@almach/ui";

<Badge>Default</Badge>
<Badge variant="success">Active</Badge>
<Badge variant="destructive">Error</Badge>
<Badge variant="warning">Pending</Badge>
<Badge variant="outline">Tag</Badge>
<Badge variant="ghost">Muted</Badge>
<Badge variant="secondary">Secondary</Badge>
```

**Variants:** `"default"` | `"secondary"` | `"destructive"` | `"success"` | `"warning"` | `"outline"` | `"ghost"`

---

### Card

Compound component with sub-components: `Card.Header`, `Card.Title`, `Card.Description`, `Card.Content`, `Card.Section`, `Card.Row`, `Card.Footer`, `Card.Layers`, `Card.LayerHeader`, `Card.LayerBody`, `Card.LayerRow`, `Card.Group`, `Card.GroupRow`.

```tsx
import { Card } from "@almach/ui";

// Standard card
<Card>
  <Card.Header action={<Badge>New</Badge>}>
    <Card.Title>Card Title</Card.Title>
    <Card.Description>Optional description text.</Card.Description>
  </Card.Header>
  <Card.Content>Main content goes here.</Card.Content>
  <Card.Section>A bordered section below content.</Card.Section>
  <Card.Row action={<ChevronRightIcon />} onClick={() => {}}>
    Clickable row
  </Card.Row>
  <Card.Footer>
    <Button>Action</Button>
  </Card.Footer>
</Card>

// Layered card (Claude/macOS-style stacked panels)
<Card.Layers>
  <Card.LayerHeader action={<Badge>Live</Badge>}>Settings</Card.LayerHeader>
  <Card.LayerBody>Content in a layer.</Card.LayerBody>
  <Card.LayerRow action={<Switch />}>Enable feature</Card.LayerRow>
</Card.Layers>
```

**Card.Header Props:** `action?: React.ReactNode` — right-side element (icon, badge, button).
**Card.Row Props:** `action?: React.ReactNode`, standard div props. Adds hover styles when `onClick` is provided.

---

### Alert

```tsx
import { Alert, AlertTitle, AlertDescription } from "@almach/ui";

<Alert>
  <AlertTitle>Heads up!</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>You can change this in settings.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>
<Alert variant="destructive">
  <AlertTitle>Error</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>Something went wrong.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>
```

**Variants:** `"default"` | `"destructive"`

---

### Avatar

```tsx
import { Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback } from "@almach/ui";

<Avatar>
  <AvatarImage src="/avatar.png" alt="User" />
  <AvatarFallback>AB</AvatarFallback>
</Avatar>
```

---

### Checkbox

```tsx
import { Checkbox } from "@almach/ui";

<Checkbox id="terms" />
<Checkbox id="terms" checked={checked} onCheckedChange={setChecked} />
```

---

### Radio

```tsx
import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from "@almach/ui";

<RadioGroup value={value} onValueChange={setValue}>
  <RadioGroupItem value="a" id="a" />
  <RadioGroupItem value="b" id="b" />
</RadioGroup>
```

---

### Switch

```tsx
import { Switch } from "@almach/ui";

<Switch checked={enabled} onCheckedChange={setEnabled} />
```

---

### Select

```tsx
import { Select, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectItem } from "@almach/ui";

<Select value={value} onValueChange={setValue}>
  <SelectTrigger>
    <SelectValue placeholder="Choose..." />
  </SelectTrigger>
  <SelectContent>
    <SelectItem value="a">Option A</SelectItem>
    <SelectItem value="b">Option B</SelectItem>
  </SelectContent>
</Select>
```

---

### Textarea

```tsx
import { Textarea } from "@almach/ui";

<Textarea placeholder="Write something..." rows={4} />
```

---

### Label

```tsx
import { Label } from "@almach/ui";

<Label htmlFor="email">Email address</Label>
```

---

### Tabs

```tsx
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent } from "@almach/ui";

<Tabs defaultValue="overview">
  <TabsList>
    <TabsTrigger value="overview">Overview</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="settings">Settings</TabsTrigger>
  </TabsList>
  <TabsContent value="overview">Overview content</TabsContent>
  <TabsContent value="settings">Settings content</TabsContent>
</Tabs>
```

---

### Dialog

```tsx
import { Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter } from "@almach/ui";

<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger asChild>
    <Button>Open</Button>
  </DialogTrigger>
  <DialogContent>
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>Are you sure?</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>This action cannot be undone.</DialogDescription>
    </DialogHeader>
    <DialogFooter>
      <Button variant="destructive">Delete</Button>
    </DialogFooter>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

---

### Drawer

```tsx
import { Drawer, DrawerTrigger, DrawerContent, DrawerHeader, DrawerTitle } from "@almach/ui";

<Drawer>
  <DrawerTrigger asChild>
    <Button>Open Drawer</Button>
  </DrawerTrigger>
  <DrawerContent>
    <DrawerHeader>
      <DrawerTitle>Settings</DrawerTitle>
    </DrawerHeader>
    {/* content */}
  </DrawerContent>
</Drawer>
```

---

### Modal

A simpler dialog alternative without the full Dialog API:

```tsx
import { Modal } from "@almach/ui";

<Modal open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen} title="Confirm" description="Are you sure?">
  <Button onClick={() => setOpen(false)}>Cancel</Button>
</Modal>
```

---

### Popover

```tsx
import { Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent } from "@almach/ui";

<Popover>
  <PopoverTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="outline">Options</Button>
  </PopoverTrigger>
  <PopoverContent>Popover content here.</PopoverContent>
</Popover>
```

---

### DropdownMenu

```tsx
import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuSeparator } from "@almach/ui";

<DropdownMenu>
  <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="ghost"><MoreHorizontalIcon /></Button>
  </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
    <DropdownMenuItem>Edit</DropdownMenuItem>
    <DropdownMenuItem>Duplicate</DropdownMenuItem>
    <DropdownMenuSeparator />
    <DropdownMenuItem className="text-destructive">Delete</DropdownMenuItem>
  </DropdownMenuContent>
</DropdownMenu>
```

---

### Command

```tsx
import { Command, CommandInput, CommandList, CommandEmpty, CommandGroup, CommandItem } from "@almach/ui";

<Command>
  <CommandInput placeholder="Search..." />
  <CommandList>
    <CommandEmpty>No results found.</CommandEmpty>
    <CommandGroup heading="Suggestions">
      <CommandItem>Calendar</CommandItem>
      <CommandItem>Settings</CommandItem>
    </CommandGroup>
  </CommandList>
</Command>
```

---

### Select.Searchable (Combobox)

Searchable select with a popover and built-in search input. Replaces the standalone Combobox.

```tsx
import { Select } from "@almach/ui";

const options = [
  { label: "React", value: "react" },
  { label: "Vue", value: "vue" },
];

<Select.Searchable
  options={options}
  value={value}
  onChange={setValue}
  placeholder="Select framework…"
  searchPlaceholder="Search…"
/>
```

---

### Calendar

```tsx
import { Calendar } from "@almach/ui";

<Calendar
  mode="single"
  selected={date}
  onSelect={setDate}
  defaultMonth={new Date()}
/>
```

---

### Table

```tsx
import { Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell } from "@almach/ui";

<Table>
  <TableHeader>
    <TableRow>
      <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
      <TableHead>Status</TableHead>
    </TableRow>
  </TableHeader>
  <TableBody>
    <TableRow>
      <TableCell>Alice</TableCell>
      <TableCell><Badge variant="success">Active</Badge></TableCell>
    </TableRow>
  </TableBody>
</Table>
```

---

### Carousel

```tsx
import { Carousel, CarouselContent, CarouselItem, CarouselPrevious, CarouselNext } from "@almach/ui";

<Carousel>
  <CarouselContent>
    <CarouselItem>Slide 1</CarouselItem>
    <CarouselItem>Slide 2</CarouselItem>
  </CarouselContent>
  <CarouselPrevious />
  <CarouselNext />
</Carousel>
```

---

### Progress

```tsx
import { Progress } from "@almach/ui";

<Progress value={60} />
```

---

### Skeleton

```tsx
import { Skeleton } from "@almach/ui";

<Skeleton className="h-4 w-48" />
<Skeleton className="h-12 w-12 rounded-full" />
```

---

### Separator

```tsx
import { Separator } from "@almach/ui";

<Separator />
<Separator orientation="vertical" />
```

---

### Tooltip

```tsx
import { Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider } from "@almach/ui";

<TooltipProvider>
  <Tooltip>
    <TooltipTrigger asChild>
      <Button variant="ghost"><HelpCircleIcon /></Button>
    </TooltipTrigger>
    <TooltipContent>Helpful tip</TooltipContent>
  </Tooltip>
</TooltipProvider>
```

---

### Collapsible

```tsx
import { Collapsible, CollapsibleTrigger, CollapsibleContent } from "@almach/ui";

<Collapsible open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
  <CollapsibleTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="ghost">Toggle</Button>
  </CollapsibleTrigger>
  <CollapsibleContent>Hidden content</CollapsibleContent>
</Collapsible>
```

---

### Card.Group

Grouped rows with an optional label and hint. Merged into Card — use `Card.Group` and `Card.GroupRow`.

```tsx
import { Card } from "@almach/ui";

// Navigation list
<Card.Group>
  <Card.GroupRow action={<ArrowRightIcon />}>Get started</Card.GroupRow>
  <Card.GroupRow action={<ArrowRightIcon />}>Documentation</Card.GroupRow>
</Card.Group>

// Settings with label + hint
<Card.Group label="Notifications" hint="These apply to your account.">
  <Card.GroupRow
    label="Email alerts"
    description="Receive summaries and digests."
    action={<Switch defaultChecked />}
  />
  <Card.GroupRow label="Push notifications" action={<Switch />} />
</Card.Group>

// Form fields
<Card.Group label="Account">
  <Card.GroupRow label="Display name" htmlFor="name">
    <Input id="name" defaultValue="Alice" className="w-40" />
  </Card.GroupRow>
</Card.Group>
```

**Card.Group Props:** `label?: string`, `hint?: string`, plus all div props.
**Card.GroupRow Props:** `label?: string`, `description?: string`, `htmlFor?: string`, `required?: boolean`, `action?: React.ReactNode`, `onClick?: () => void`.

---

### TagInput

```tsx
import { TagInput } from "@almach/ui";

<TagInput
  value={tags}
  onChange={setTags}
  placeholder="Add tag..."
/>
```

---

### Toast & Toaster

Powered by Sonner. Add `<Toaster />` once at the app root. Call `toast()` from anywhere.

```tsx
import { Toaster, toast } from "@almach/ui";

// App root
<Toaster />

// Anywhere in your app
toast("Notification", { description: "You have a new message." });
toast.success("Saved!", { description: "Your changes were saved." });
toast.error("Error", { description: "Something failed." });
toast.warning("Warning", { description: "Please review your input." });
toast.promise(saveData(), {
  loading: "Saving…",
  success: "Saved!",
  error: "Failed to save.",
});
```

---

## @almach/ui Hooks

```tsx
import { useMediaQuery, useIsMobile, useCopyToClipboard } from "@almach/ui";

// Responsive
const isDesktop = useMediaQuery("(min-width: 768px)");
const isMobile = useIsMobile(); // true when width < 768px

// Clipboard
const [copied, copy] = useCopyToClipboard();
copy("text to copy");
```

---

## @almach/forms

### useBasedForm

Opinionated wrapper around TanStack Form. Zod schemas are supported natively.

```tsx
import { useBasedForm, z } from "@almach/forms";
import { Button } from "@almach/ui";

const schema = z.object({
  email: z.string().email("Invalid email"),
  password: z.string().min(8, "Min 8 characters"),
});

function LoginForm() {
  const form = useBasedForm({
    defaultValues: { email: "", password: "" },
    validators: { onChange: schema },
    onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
      await login(value);
    },
  });

  return (
    <form
      onSubmit={(e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        form.handleSubmit();
      }}
      className="space-y-4"
    >
      <form.AppField name="email" validators={{ onChange: z.string().email() }}>
        {() => <form.TextField label="Email" type="email" required />}
      </form.AppField>

      <form.AppField name="password">
        {() => <form.TextField label="Password" type="password" required />}
      </form.AppField>

      <form.Subscribe selector={(s) => s.isSubmitting}>
        {(isSubmitting) => (
          <Button type="submit" loading={isSubmitting} className="w-full">
            Sign in
          </Button>
        )}
      </form.Subscribe>
    </form>
  );
}
```

### Field Components

All field components must be used inside `form.AppField`:

| Component | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `form.TextField` | Text `<input>` with label, description, error |
| `form.TextareaField` | Multi-line textarea |
| `form.SelectField` | Dropdown select (requires `options` prop) |
| `form.CheckboxField` | Checkbox with label |
| `form.SwitchField` | Toggle switch with label |

**TextField / TextareaField Props:**

| Prop | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `label` | `string` | Field label |
| `description` | `string` | Help text below the field |
| `required` | `boolean` | Shows required indicator |
| All native input/textarea props | | `type`, `placeholder`, etc. |

**SelectField Props:**

| Prop | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `label` | `string` | Field label |
| `options` | `SelectOption[]` | `{ label: string; value: string }[]` |
| `placeholder` | `string` | Placeholder text |

**CheckboxField / SwitchField Props:**

| Prop | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `label` | `string` | Label shown next to control |
| `description` | `string` | Help text |

### Low-level Form Primitives

Use these to build custom field layouts:

```tsx
import {
  FormItem,
  FormLabel,
  FormControl,
  FormDescription,
  FormMessage,
  useFormField,
} from "@almach/forms";

function CustomField({ label, description }: { label: string; description?: string }) {
  const { error } = useFormField();
  return (
    <FormItem>
      <FormLabel>{label}</FormLabel>
      <FormControl>
        <input className="..." />
      </FormControl>
      {description && <FormDescription>{description}</FormDescription>}
      <FormMessage />
    </FormItem>
  );
}
```

### Field Context Hooks

```tsx
import { useFieldContext, useFormContext } from "@almach/forms";

// Inside a field component:
const field = useFieldContext<string>(); // gives .state.value, .handleChange, .handleBlur, .state.meta
const form = useFormContext(); // gives the full form API
```

---

## @almach/query

### BasedQueryProvider

```tsx
import { BasedQueryProvider } from "@almach/query";

// Defaults:
// - staleTime: 60_000 (1 minute)
// - gcTime: 300_000 (5 minutes)
// - retry: 3 (skips retry on 4xx errors)
// - RSC-compatible (no hydration boundary needed separately)

export default function RootLayout({ children }) {
  return <BasedQueryProvider>{children}</BasedQueryProvider>;
}
```

### createQuery

```tsx
import { createQuery, useQuery } from "@almach/query";

// Define once
export const userQuery = createQuery({
  queryKey: (id: string) => ["users", id],
  queryFn: (id) => fetch(`/api/users/${id}`).then((r) => r.json()),
  staleTime: 30_000, // optional
});

// Use anywhere
const { data, isLoading, error } = useQuery(userQuery.options(userId));

// Prefetch (server)
await queryClient.prefetchQuery(userQuery.options(userId));
```

### createMutation

```tsx
import { createMutation } from "@almach/query";

export const useCreateUser = createMutation({
  mutationFn: (data: CreateUserInput) =>
    fetch("/api/users", { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify(data) }).then((r) => r.json()),
  invalidates: [["users"]], // auto-invalidated on success
  onSuccess: (data) => {
    toast({ title: "User created!" });
  },
});

// In component:
const createUser = useCreateUser();
createUser.mutate({ name: "Alice", email: "alice@example.com" });
```

### createServerAction

For Next.js / React Server Actions:

```tsx
import { createServerAction } from "@almach/query";
import { createPostAction } from "./actions";

export function useCreatePost() {
  return createServerAction({
    action: createPostAction,         // Server Action returning ActionResult<T>
    invalidates: [["posts"]],
    onSuccess: (data) => router.push(`/posts/${data.id}`),
    onError: (error) => toast({ title: error.message, variant: "destructive" }),
  });
}
```

Server action must return `ActionResult<T>`:

```ts
type ActionResult<T> =
  | { success: true; data: T }
  | { success: false; error: ActionError };

interface ActionError {
  code?: string;
  message: string;
  fields?: Record<string, string[]>; // field-level validation errors
}
```

### useInvalidate

```tsx
import { useInvalidate } from "@almach/query";

const invalidate = useInvalidate(["users"], ["posts"]);
// Call to manually refetch
await invalidate();
```

### useOptimisticUpdate

```tsx
import { useOptimisticUpdate, useMutation } from "@almach/query";

const { optimisticUpdate } = useOptimisticUpdate<Todo[]>(["todos"]);

const mutation = useMutation({
  mutationFn: updateTodo,
  onMutate: async (newTodo) =>
    optimisticUpdate((prev) =>
      prev?.map((t) => (t.id === newTodo.id ? { ...t, ...newTodo } : t))
    ),
  onError: (_err, _vars, context) => context?.rollback(),
  onSettled: () => queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["todos"] }),
});
```

### TanStack Query re-exports

Everything from `@tanstack/react-query` is re-exported for convenience:

```tsx
import {
  useQuery,
  useMutation,
  useQueryClient,
  useInfiniteQuery,
  useSuspenseQuery,
  QueryClient,
  QueryClientProvider,
  keepPreviousData,
  infiniteQueryOptions,
  queryOptions,
} from "@almach/query";
```

---

## @almach/utils

### cn — Merge class names

```tsx
import { cn } from "@almach/utils";

cn("px-4 py-2", condition && "bg-primary", className);
// Uses clsx + tailwind-merge (handles Tailwind class conflicts)
```

### formatDate

```tsx
import { formatDate } from "@almach/utils";

formatDate(new Date());                          // "Mar 20, 2026"
formatDate(new Date(), { dateStyle: "full" });   // "Friday, March 20, 2026"
formatDate(new Date(), undefined, "fr-FR");      // "20 mars 2026"
```

### formatRelativeDate

```tsx
import { formatRelativeDate } from "@almach/utils";

formatRelativeDate(new Date(Date.now() - 3600_000)); // "1 hour ago"
formatRelativeDate(new Date(Date.now() - 86400_000)); // "yesterday"
```

### URL utilities

```tsx
import { createUrl, parseSearchParams, toSearchParams } from "@almach/utils";

createUrl("/users", { page: "1", sort: "name" });
// "/users?page=1&sort=name"

parseSearchParams(new URLSearchParams("page=1&sort=name"));
// { page: "1", sort: "name" }

toSearchParams({ page: "1", sort: "name" });
// URLSearchParams { page → "1", sort → "name" }
```

### TypeScript type helpers

```tsx
import type {
  Prettify,           // Flatten intersections for readable IDE display
  NonNullableFields,  // Make all fields non-nullable
  PartialBy,          // Make specific keys optional: PartialBy<User, "avatar">
  RequiredBy,         // Make specific keys required: RequiredBy<User, "id">
  ValueOf,            // Get union of object values: ValueOf<typeof STATUS>
  Entries,            // Typed Object.entries: Entries<typeof obj>
  MaybeArray,         // T | T[]
  MaybePromise,       // T | Promise<T>
} from "@almach/utils";
```

---

## Monorepo Development

```bash
# Install all dependencies
bun install

# Build all packages (Turborepo respects dependency order)
bun run build

# Run docs site (Astro)
bun run docs

# Type-check all packages
bun run typecheck

# Lint all packages
bun run lint

# Clean build artifacts
bun run clean
```

### Releasing

```bash
# 1. Create a changeset describing your change
bun changeset

# 2. Push — CI opens a "Version Packages" PR automatically
# 3. Merge that PR → all changed packages publish to npm
```

### Architecture

```
almach-lab/base/
├── packages/
│   ├── ui/      — @almach/ui      (Radix + Tailwind components)
│   ├── forms/   — @almach/forms   (TanStack Form + Zod fields)
│   ├── query/   — @almach/query   (TanStack Query factories)
│   └── utils/   — @almach/utils   (cn, formatters, type helpers)
└── apps/
    └── docs/    — Astro docs (deployed to Cloudflare Pages)
```

### Package dependency graph

```
@almach/utils  (no internal deps)
    ↑
    ├── @almach/ui     (depends on utils)
    ├── @almach/forms  (depends on ui, utils)
    └── @almach/query  (depends on utils)
```
